title: Engineering functional ventral midbrain dopaminergic neurons in human organoids through WNT modulation and bioreactor culture
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5jg0i","text":"This protocol collection includes the following protocols:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ofhr","text":"Human iPSC Culture: Describes feeder-free maintenance and passaging of human iPSCs to preserve pluripotency for downstream differentiation.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1dn41","text":"Generation of Human Midbrain Organoids: Outlines stepwise differentiation of iPSCs into midbrain organoids using defined patterning cues and dynamic culture.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":39}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2qrt3","text":"Immunohistochemistry and Imaging: Provides a workflow for fixation, sectioning, antibody staining, and confocal imaging of organoid tissue.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3uvgo","text":"Fluorometric TUNEL Assay: Details fluorescent TUNEL labeling and imaging to quantify apoptosis in organoid sections.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3i964","text":"Treatment of Midbrain Organoids with αSyn-PFFs: Describes controlled short-term exposure of organoids to αSyn-PFFs with matched vehicle controls.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":47}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ckk7","text":"MEA Recording of Organoid Activity: Provides a procedure for measuring spontaneous and drug-modulated neuronal activity in organoids using MEA systems.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Hariam Raji
